response.original_title: Mozart : Concerto pour piano n° 21 Mao Fujita à Valence
response.overview: The piano concerto no. 21 in C major by Mozart is performed by the Valencia Orchestra with Japanese pianist Mao Fujita as soloist. The setting: The historic courtyard of the Old University. Part of europiano, ARTE's special day celebrating the piano concerto across Europe.
response.title: Mozart : Concerto pour piano n° 21 Mao Fujita à Valence
